title: Osesua Led-PTD National Leadership Commiserates With Agbor Tanker Explosion Victims - FinancialEDGE
description: The National leadership of Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG has commiserated with the families of the victims, as well as the Government of Delta State, affected by the unfortunate tanker explosion. PTD expressed this in a heartfelt statement jointly signed by its National Chairman, Comrade Lucky Osesua, his two deputies, Comrade
